mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_mcp_tool_grant (tool_id, tool_name, grant_type, grant_target_id, grant_target_name, application_id, status, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{grantType}, #{grantTargetId}, #{grantTargetName}, #{applicationId}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE grant_target_name = VALUES(grant_target_name), application_id = VALUES(application_id), status = VALUES(status), expire_time = VALUES(expire_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
